speaker: speaker1
text: Mary and Tom are breaking up .

speaker: speaker2
text: It's unbelievable ! They are only married for one month . Then who is at fault ?

speaker: speaker1
text: Mary said she couldn't put up with Tom , for he fell in love with another woman .

speaker: speaker2
text: Do you think they'll become reconciled ?

speaker: speaker1
text: No , I don't think so . She said she would rather be single than cope with an unhappy marriage .

speaker: speaker2
text: What a shame ! Their marriage is really a mistake .
